label: Aviludo April
rootCause: VL audit harness double-prefixed the PNG fixture data URL. The file `.tmp/footer-validation-4dc40c3/april-historico-png-fixture.b64.txt` already contains `data:image/png;base64,` but `.tmp/final-validation-lab-rerun/run-audit.mts` unconditionally prepends another prefix, producing `data:image/png;base64,data:image/png;base64,...`. ImageScript cannot decode this corrupt URL; all GPT passes return null and Pass C returns an empty items array with HTTP 200.
firstDivergenceDetail: Corrupt double-prefixed data URL fails image decode before geometry, crop, or any GPT pass can run. Symptom: supplier=null, invoice_date=null, total=null, items=[] — identical to prior PDF-decode failure pattern documented in aviludo-regression-audit.

strict_json_schema_rejects_aviludo.evidence: v25 with correct PNG URL returns 9/9 items in 3/3 runs; Aviludo simple table (no discount columns) extracts fine under current schema.

schema_requires_gross_discount_net.evidence: Extracted items use legacy name/qty/unit/unit_price/total fields; nullable structured keys do not block Aviludo.

v24_v25_prompt_changes_broke_pass_c.evidence: Same v25 deployment returns 9 items when image URL is valid; prompt bloat affects Emporio discount rows only.

geometry_crop_change.evidence: Geometry never reached on corrupt image path. Local geometry bounds unchanged (top=184, bottom=439, headerTop=194).

gpt_returns_empty_under_strict_schema.evidence: GPT returns full 9-item table when given decodable image on v25.

double_prefix_corrupt_url.evidence: Controlled A/B: double_prefix_bug 0/3 runs (all null); correct URL 9/3 runs (AVILUDO, 2026-04-17, 9 items). See prefix-comparison.json.

gitCommitAssessment.04c0d88_pass_c_fractional_qty: NOT_CAUSE — Aviludo April uses integer qty; works on v25 with valid PNG.
gitCommitAssessment.65452a9_phase1_phase2: NOT_CAUSE — geometry margin change does not explain 0 rows on corrupt image.
gitCommitAssessment.de556e0_phase3_binder: NOT_CAUSE — binder runs after GPT; never reached on corrupt image.
gitCommitAssessment.ec5f42f_schema_enforcement: NOT_CAUSE — schema works for Aviludo on valid PNG at v25.
gitCommitAssessment.note: No production commit introduced 0-row behavior. Failure is confined to audit harness URL construction.

smallestFixRecommendation.change: In any script loading `.b64.txt` fixtures, normalize URL: if file starts with `data:`, use as-is; otherwise prepend `data:image/png;base64,` after stripping any embedded prefix. Pattern already correct in `.tmp/aviludo-regression-audit/run-audit.mts` line 83.
smallestFixRecommendation.example:
const raw = readFileSync(path, 'utf8').trim();
const imageDataUrl = raw.startsWith('data:') ? raw : `data:image/png;base64,${raw.replace(/^data:image\/[^;]+;base64,/, '')}`;

expectedImpactOnVLMetrics.aprilExpectedAfterFix: near 0 if GT alignment holds (9 rows, historical match)
expectedImpactOnVLMetrics.fieldAccuracyImpact: April contributes 9 GT rows; recovering them should raise global field accuracy materially above 64%
